description: EverBee Research workflows for product analytics, keyword research, and shop analysis

tools.name: folders_list_folders
tools.description: GET /folders. Optional: type (default: listing). Returns the folders.

params.name: type
params.description: Folder type observed in EverBee traffic: listing, keyword_analytic, or shop

tools.name: keyword_research_list_default_keyword_suggestion
tools.description: GET /keyword_research/default_keyword_suggestion. Optional: order_by (default: new_volume), order_direction (default: desc), page (default: 1) (plus 1 more). Returns the default_keyword_suggestion.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Sort field observed in EverBee traffic

tools.name: management_modals_list_management_modals
tools.description: GET /management_modals. Required: last_reset_at, show_manage_keyword_modal, show_manage_listing_modal, show_manage_shop_modal. Returns the management_modals.

tools.name: product_analytics_list_default_product_analytics
tools.description: GET /product_analytics/default_product_analytics. Optional: order_by (default: est_mo_revenue), order_direction (default: desc), page (default: 1) (plus 2 more). Returns the default_product_analytics.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Sort field observed in EverBee traffic

tools.name: shops_list_shops
tools.description: GET /shops. Optional: order_by (default: revenue), order_direction (default: desc), page (default: 1) (plus 1 more). Returns the shops.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Sort field observed in EverBee traffic
